title: groupby on Categorical column returns extra empty groups in 2.2
body:
Reproducer: `df.groupby('cat_col', observed=False)` returns one row per category level even when no row of `df` has that level. In 2.1 the default was `observed=True`. Either restore the default or document the change in the release notes — silent change.

MRE attached as a gist.

comments.body: Thanks for the report. The default flip was intentional (#54321) but the docs gap is a real bug. PR to update the changelog incoming.
